og.title: I built a little something. This is a Figma plugin that checks whether your designs are actually ready for agents and MCP, and just as importantly, it tells you why each thing matters. So you are not… | Christine Vallaure de la Paz | 26 comments
og.description:
I built a little something. This is a Figma plugin that checks whether your designs are actually ready for agents and MCP, and just as importantly, it tells you why each thing matters. So you are not blindly ticking boxes; you are starting to understand what makes a file readable to AI in the first place.

Also, those rules are nothing exotic. They are simply good design system file basics. So it works as a lovely little checker whether you are handing off to humans, to AI, or the two together.
